goal: function_even[A, B](f) = forall(x0: A) { f(-x0) = f(x0) }

p.c: function[T0: Neg, T1](x0: T0 -> T1) { forall(x1: T0) { x0(-x1) = x0(x1) } = function_even[T0, T1](x0) }[A, B](f)

function[T0, T1](x0: T1, x1: T0) { constant[T0, T1](x0, x1) = x0 }[A, B](b, lib(functions).identity_fn(-x))

not function_even[A, B](constant[A, B](b)) or forall(x0: A) { constant(b, -x0) = constant(b, x0) } = true
(forall(x0: A) { not function_even[A, B](constant[A, B](b)) or constant(b, -x0) = constant(b, x0) })
not forall(x0: A) { constant(b, -x0) = constant(b, x0) } or function_even[A, B](constant[A, B](b))
exists(k0: A) { constant(b, -k0) != constant(b, k0) } or function_even[A, B](constant[A, B](b))
not forall(x0: A) { constant(b, -x0) = constant(b, x0) }
let w0: A satisfy { constant(b, -w0) != constant(b, w0) }

exists(k0: A) { pointwise_zero[A, B](-k0) != pointwise_zero[A, B](k0) }

function(x0: A) { pointwise_zero[A, B](-x0) = pointwise_zero[A, B](x0) }(w0)

goal: compose[A, B, C](f, g, x) = f(g(x))
